name: The Living Marquee
text:
Defender
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, the marquee flashes — read this card's name aloud in your best carnival-barker voice. If you do, draw a card. If you mumble it, the bulbs flicker out and you get nothing. The table judges sincerity.
flavorText: Half the bulbs are dead. The half that work spell something rude after midnight.

extras.fourthWall: read the card name aloud as a barker to draw
